title: Soulection Radio Show #442 (The People's Choice)
content:
It's been a minute, but Joe Kay is allowing fans to controll Soulection Radio with The Peoples Choice.

<!--more-->

[Listen to other The Peoples Choice Episodes](/episodes/the-peoples-choice)
